title: psacalium strictum
intro: Psacalium strictum, also known as Jerusalem artichoke sunflower or Mexican sunflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psacalium strictum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress levels. Herbal preparations of Psacalium strictum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
